category_sources: Official VSEARCH documentation describes metabarcoding, metagenomics, genomics, and population genetics use.
source_facts.description says vsearch is for microbiome analysis.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and official documentation use the VSEARCH project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki and README provide project documentation.
Official documentation page at torognes.github.io/vsearch links source and documents all commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/torognes/vsearch; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official docs describe metabarcoding, metagenomics, FASTA/FASTQ processing, clustering, and taxonomic classification.
